news.title: 'Resumption of hostilities': Seized ship, vessel attacks push U.S.-Iran ceasefire toward brink
news.summary: A U.S. seizure of an Iranian cargo ship and reports of vessels coming under fire in the Gulf have pushed a fragile ceasefire with Tehran to the brink.

news.title: Sandwich chain Jersey Mike's confidentially files for IPO
news.summary: Blackstone bought a majority stake in the sandwich chain in 2024 in a deal that valued the company at roughly $8 billion. Blackstone bought the majority stake for $3.5 billion.

news.title: Investors are misreading news about the Iran war, analysts say as markets whipsaw
news.summary: Monday's declines put the brakes on another rapid recovery in global stock indices. Last year's 'liberation day' bounce was similar to this year's decline.

news.title: Kevin Warsh would be the first tech bro Fed chair. How Silicon Valley shaped him
news.summary: The nominee to lead the Fed is an AI optimist who counts tech titans Peter Thiel and Marc Andreessen among his friends. The nominee is also the son of former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani.

news.title: Eli Lilly agrees to acquire cancer drug maker Kelonia in deal worth up to $7 billion
news.summary: Kelonia is developing technology to reprogram patients' T-cells inside the body so those cells can attack cancer. The technology is called in vivo CAR-T.

news.title: Do I earn too much to have an IRA?
news.summary: CNN.com will feature iReporter photos in a weekly Travel Snapshots gallery. Visit CNN.com/Travel each week for a new gallery of snapshots from around the world.

news.title: One company is responsible for half of S&P 500 earnings revisions since Iran war’s start
news.summary: One company is responsible for half of the increase in S&P 500 earnings expectations since the Iran war started. That company is Apple.

news.title: Psychedelic stocks jump as high as 40% after Trump supports using drugs like LSD for mental health
news.summary: An executive order aims to speed up how quickly psychedelic drugs for mental illness can move through the regulatory process. The order was issued by President Barack Obama.

news.title: ‘Some stocks have risen, but others have flopped’: I will soon inherit my parents’ $1.5 million estate. Do I fire the adviser who charges a 3% fee?
news.summary: “This broker does not achieve returns better than the S&P 500,” he says. “It’s not a good investment.” He adds: “I don’t think the market is interested in it.’

news.title: AST SpaceMobile’s stock is falling after failure of Jeff Bezos-backed satellite launch
news.summary: Blue Origin successfully launched AST SpaceMobile’s satellite to orbit, but it was at the wrong altitude. Blue Origin successfully launch AST Space mobile's satellite to space.
